Silk Value Digital Platform – Architecture & PRD Handover

This document is prepared for solution architects and development partners\. It consolidates the end\-to\-end business flow, digital system architecture, and PRD structure for the Silk Value procurement, traceability, and payment platform\. Single app whould integrate all activities with limited access to each stakeholders\.

# 1\. End\-to\-End Digital Flow \(Business \+ System\)

The following flowchart represents the complete operational and digital lifecycle from reeler onboarding to finished goods traceability\.

__1️⃣ END\-TO\-END FLOW CHART__

__*Silk Value Digital Collection, Traceability & Payment Platform*__

You can use this __as\-is__ in DPR / PPT / PRD\.

__A\) HIGH\-LEVEL FLOW \(Business \+ Tech Combined\)__

Reeler Onboarding & KYC

        ↓

Reeler Geo\-Tagging & Cluster Mapping

        ↓

Daily Route Planning \(Vehicle \+ Collector Assigned\)

        ↓

Door\-to\-Door Collection Event

\(GPS \+ Time \+ Weight \+ Quality\)

        ↓

Instant / Scheduled Payment Trigger

        ↓

Vehicle\-Level Aggregation

        ↓

Factory Gate Cross Weighment

        ↓

Gate QC Acceptance / Rejection

        ↓

Final Payment Settlement

        ↓

Batch Creation & Processing Traceability

        ↓

Packing \+ COA Generation

        ↓

Customer Dispatch & Traceability

        ↓

Analytics, Reports & Bank/NGO Integration \( future\)

__B\) DETAILED FLOW \(Operational Accuracy\)__

\[ REELER APP \]

Reeler Registration

→ KYC Upload \(Aadhaar/PAN/Bank\)

→ Approval by Admin

→ Reeler ID \+ QR Generated

→ Reeler Dashboard Active

\[ COLLECTION PLANNING \]

Admin/Supervisor

→ Map Reelers by Cluster

→ Assign Vehicle \+ Collector

→ Generate Route Plan

→ Push Schedule to Collector App

\[ FIELD COLLECTION – COLLECTOR APP \]

Collector Starts Route

→ GPS \+ Time Auto Logged

→ Select Reeler / Scan QR

→ Weigh Pupae \(Bluetooth / Manual\)

→ Enter Crate Count

→ Quick Quality Grade

→ Photo \(Optional\)

→ Collection Ticket Generated

→ Payment Triggered \(Instant / Weekly\)

→ Reeler Receives Notification

\[ VEHICLE TRACEABILITY \]

Vehicle ID \+ Collector ID

→ Linked to All Collection Tickets

→ Trip Sheet Auto Generated

→ Expected Gate Weight Calculated

\[ FACTORY GATE \]

Vehicle Check\-In

→ Gate Weighment

→ Compare with Field Weight

→ QC Check \(Accept / Reject / Deduction\)

→ Final Accepted Qty per Reeler

→ Ledger Updated

\[ PAYMENTS \]

Finance Approval \(Auto / Manual\)

→ Bank / UPI Payout

→ Payment Confirmation

→ Reeler Ledger Updated

\[ PROCESSING & TRACEABILITY \]

Batch ID Created

→ Link All Reeler Tickets

→ Drying \+ QC Results Logged

→ Packing \(25 kg bags\)

→ COA Generated

\[ DISPATCH \]

Sales Order Linked

→ Batch Selected

\[ ANALYTICS & REPORTING \]

Admin Dashboard

→ Reeler Income Reports

→ Collection Efficiency

→ Quality Trends

→ ESG Impact Metrics

→ Bank / NGO Reports \(Consent\-based\)

__2️⃣ PRD \(PRODUCT REQUIREMENTS DOCUMENT\) – STRUCTURE__

__“PRD – Silk Value Digital Procurement & Traceability Platform”__

__1\. Document Overview__

- Product Name
- Version
- Prepared by
- Date
- Stakeholders

__2\. Problem Statement__

- Unorganised pupae collection
- No traceability
- Payment delays
- No formal income proof for reelers
- No data layer for banks/NGOs

__3\. Product Vision & Objectives__

__Vision:__  
Create India’s first __traceable, payment\-enabled sericulture by\-product platform__ that converts waste into value while uplifting reelers\.

__Objectives:__

- 100% traceability from reeler to finished goods
- Same\-day or defined\-cycle payments
- Bank\-ready transaction history for reelers
- Scalable cluster\-based model

__4\. User Personas__

1. Reeler
2. Collection Agent
3. Supervisor
4. Factory QC Operator
5. Finance/Admin
6. External Partner \(Bank/NGO – Read Only\)

__5\. User Roles & Permissions__

__Role__

__Permissions__

Reeler

View own data, earnings

Collector

Collect, weigh, submit

Supervisor

Route, approve, monitor

QC Operator

Gate QC, accept/reject

Admin

Full control

__6\. Functional Requirements \(Core Modules\)__

__6\.1 Reeler Onboarding & KYC__

- Mandatory KYC
- Geo\-tagging
- Consent capture
- Reeler ID & QR

__6\.2 Route & Collection Management__

- Cluster mapping
- Vehicle assignment
- GPS tracking
- Time stamping

__6\.3 Collection Ticket System__

- Weight capture
- Quality grade
- Photo proof
- Digital receipt

__6\.4 Weighment Reconciliation__

- Field vs Gate comparison
- Variance rules
- Auto alerts

__6\.5 Payments & Ledger__

- Instant / weekly payout
- Reeler ledger
- Downloadable statements

__6\.6 Processing & Batch Traceability__

- Batch ID creation
- QC parameter logging
- COA generation

__6\.7 Analytics & Reporting__

- Reeler income reports
- Cluster productivity
- ESG impact dashboards

__7\. Non\-Functional Requirements__

- Offline\-first app
- Data encryption
- Audit logs
- Role\-based access
- Scalability \(multi\-state\)

__8\. Integrations__

- Weighing scale \(Bluetooth\)
- Payment gateway
- GPS/Maps
- Accounting software \(future\)
- Bank APIs \(future\)

__9\. Compliance & Data Governance__

- Consent\-based data sharing
- KYC compliance
- Audit trail retention
- Data privacy safeguards

__10\. MVP Scope \(Phase 1\)__

__Must Have__

- Reeler onboarding
- Collection ticket
- Payments
- Gate verification
- Dashboard

__Nice to Have__

- COA automation
- Bank reporting
- NGO dashboards

__11\. Phase\-wise Roadmap__

__Phase__

__Features__

Phase 1

Collection \+ Payment

Phase 2

QC \+ Batch \+ COA

Phase 3

Bank/NGO integration

Phase 4

Credit scoring

__12\. KPIs & Success Metrics__

- % reelers KYC completed
- Avg payment time
- Weight mismatch %
- Reeler income growth
- Adoption per cluster

__13\. Risks & Mitigation__

- Network issues → Offline sync
- Manipulation → Dual weighment
- Adoption resistance → Training & incentives
